EmailTemplate.description: Welcome email to new mobile app users
EmailTemplate.name: Alliance Connect: New Member Welcome Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to {!Community_Name}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Receiving_User.FirstName},
You're almost ready to go! The Alliance Connect app will give you access to thousands of shifts, and contracts all across Australia. Sign-in via the link below and setup your payee profiles. Once you're made active you can pick when and where you want to work or put your availability in for priority access to your preferred shifts.
Complete the steps to setup your Alliance Connect profile.
Review your payroll details, or enter them if this is your first time.
Go to the main menu, open Payroll Profile. Select More, then complete each section:
Payment details TFN declaration Superannuation choice Deductions (if applicable)
Follow the link below to get started:
{!Community_Url}
Username: {!Receiving_User.Username}
Please update your payroll details including banking details and super choice.
Thanks, {!Organization.Name}
